base_url.description: corona-zahlen.org API base URL override for tests or proxies. Defaults to https://api.corona-zahlen.org.

days.description: Optional 'days' query parameter, sent verbatim on every stream's request when set (matching legacy's unconditional query.Set("days", ...) — legacy applies this to all 5 streams, not only the two history streams, even though the germany/states/districts endpoints do not document a days parameter). Omitted entirely when unset.
